CRANK_META_001 — `# crank-allow:` annotation without `# reason:` follow-up.

Layer A suppression hygiene. Every suppression must have a non-empty
`# reason: ...` comment on the next line so reviewers can see *why* the
exception was granted.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/suppressions_test.exs — parser tests for missing reason.
